title: VibraModuleSurface
description: Loose schema for a parsed module root mapping (post-YAML). Module-level keys are symbol names (kebab-case, optional leading `-` for module-private). A symbol's value is either a scalar (constant) or a definition envelope: a mapping with exactly one `$`-form key (`$function`, `$import`, or one of the type constructors in type-expr.schema.json, including `$newtype`, `$policy`, and `$grant-token`) plus zero or more `=`-prefixed annotation siblings (`=where`, `=doc`, `=defs`, `=impl`).

additionalProperties.description: Symbol definition: scalar (constant), or a mapping whose keys each match `^\$[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9.\-]*$` (form / type-form key) or `^=[a-z][a-z0-9]*(-[a-z0-9]+)*$` (annotation). Bare un-prefixed keys like `where`/`doc` are rejected (`E-ANNO-002`).
